feature-creep.settings.enabled.name: Enable Feature Creep
feature-creep.settings.enabled.hint: Allow AI generation buttons on D&D5e item sheets.
feature-creep.settings.anthropicApiKey.h: Your Anthropic API key used to generate item setup data.
feature-creep.settings.model.name: Anthropic Model
feature-creep.settings.model.hint: Model name used for generation requests.
feature-creep.settings.maxTokens.name: Max Tokens
feature-creep.settings.requestEndpoint.h: Endpoint used for AI requests. Use a CORS-enabled relay/proxy URL (recommended) instead of Anthropic direct in browser clients.
feature-creep.settings.relayAuthHeader.h: Optional Authorization header value sent to your relay, e.g. Bearer <token>.
feature-creep.settings.replaceGeneratedE: Delete effects generated by this module before creating new ones.
feature-creep.notifications.apiKeyMissin: Set your Anthropic API key in Feature Creep settings first.
feature-creep.notifications.gmOnly: Feature Creep can only be used by the Game Master.
feature-creep.notifications.noDescriptio: Item description is empty. Add a description before running AI setup.
feature-creep.notifications.success: Feature Creep finished applying item setup.
feature-creep.notifications.guessCrFaile: Feature Creep failed while estimating CR. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.rebalanceSuc: Feature Creep finished rebalancing {name} for CR {cr}.
feature-creep.notifications.rebalanceFai: Feature Creep failed while rebalancing the monster. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.invalidTarge: Enter a valid challenge rating such as 2, 5, 1/2, or 1/4.
feature-creep.notifications.invalidRespo: Anthropic returned an invalid response format.
feature-creep.notifications.corsBlocked: AI request blocked by CORS. Set Feature Creep "AI Request Endpoint" to a CORS-enabled relay/proxy.
feature-creep.notifications.failed: Feature Creep failed. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.lootFailed: Feature Creep failed while generating loot. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.noJournalCon: This journal has no usable text content for item generation.
feature-creep.notifications.journalItems: Feature Creep failed while generating journal items. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.craftFailed: Feature Creep failed while generating crafted items. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.creatingReci: Creating Beavers Crafting recipes from generated outputs…
feature-creep.notifications.recipeCreate: No recipes were created from the generated outputs.
Feature Creep failed while creating Beavers Crafting recipes. Check console for details.
feature-creep.notifications.recipeIntegr: Recipe integration requires active modules: beavers-system-interface, beavers-crafting, and bsa-dnd5e.
feature-creep.notifications.noCraftingTo: This actor needs at least one tool before crafting items can be generated.
feature-creep.notifications.noCraftingIt: This actor needs at least one inventory item to use as a crafting input.
feature-creep.notifications.selectCraftI: Select at least one inventory item to use for crafting.
feature-creep.notifications.invalidCraft: Select a valid tool before generating crafted items.
feature-creep.dialog.title: Feature Creep
feature-creep.dialog.content: Generate and apply item details, activities, effects, advancements, and Item Macro from this item description?
feature-creep.rebalanceDialog.title: Rebalance Monster
feature-creep.rebalanceDialog.content: Rebalance {name} from its current CR of {currentCr} to a new target CR.
feature-creep.craftDialog.title: Craft Items
feature-creep.craftDialog.content: DM tool: choose a tool and resource quantities to generate craftable output items with suggested DCs.
feature-creep.craftDialog.notesPlacehold: Optional goal or style, such as reinforced shield fittings or carved wooden charms.
feature-creep.guessCrDialog.title: Estimated Challenge Rating
feature-creep.lootDialog.title: Generated Loot: {name}
feature-creep.journalDialog.title: Generated Items from Journal: {name}
feature-creep.journalDialog.noItems: No items were generated from this journal.
